title: ReadyHomes
description: Generate some buildings for players to live in
body:
Tired of having to worry about building temporary shelters while exploring the world? The 'Instant Check In' mod solves this problem for you! This lightweight and practical module will naturally generate various styles of buildings in the world - from forest cabins, desert stations to mountaintop watchtowers, each with exquisite design and complete functions, and can be moved in just by opening the door!
